name: pr_cep_e_exists_infer_before
comment: D-135: exists inference, BEFORE mirror. exists E1(before[0,100] $a): E0 offset lo?0=0 (reap ts+1), E1 offset hi=100 (reap ts+101). Absent @expires + advance; both reap. Firing invisible to the inference.
drl: rule EX when $a : E0() exists E1(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
